description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 21st (Saturday), I was invited to and attended the Hanno Lions Club Cherry Blossom Row lantern lighting ceremony. This ceremony is held so that the Hanno Lions Club Cherry Blossom Row will be cherished by residents as a famous cherry blossom viewing spot.

I would like to extend my gratitude to all those who made efforts to make this lighting ceremony possible.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13336.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno Lions Club Cherry Blossom Row Lantern Lighting Ceremony
